title: Policy: Remove some settings from Policy - Settings Unlocked
scenario: Verify that removing settings from a Cloud Policy and applying changes does not unlock them in the app, and that tapping a previously policy-affected setting allows the user to change its value.
steps: 1. Remove settings from a Policy on the Cloud.
2. Apply the changes to the Policy.
3. In the app, verify that the removed settings are not unlocked.
4. Tap on a previously policy-affected setting.
5. Confirm that the user is allowed to change its value.
expected: Settings removed from the Policy on the Cloud remain locked in the app after changes are applied. Tapping on a previously policy-affected setting allows the user to change its value.
